title: 用 re.sub 把多空格压成单空格
prompt:
已知一段被「多空格」污染的文本：

```python
s = 'hello   world  python  is   cool'
```

请用 `re.sub` 把**一段或多段连续的空白**替换成**一个空格**，赋给变量 `cleaned`，然后 `print(cleaned)`。

输出应该是：
```
hello world python is cool
```

提示：`\s+` 匹配「一个或多个空白字符」。
starterCode:
import re

s = 'hello   world  python  is   cool'
# cleaned = re.sub(...)
# print(cleaned)
solution:
import re

s = 'hello   world  python  is   cool'
cleaned = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
print(cleaned)
hints: re.sub(pattern, repl, string)：第二个参数是替换值
用 `\s+` 匹配「一个或多个空白」，加号是 1 次或多次

完整代码：
import re
s = 'hello   world  python  is   cool'
cleaned = re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s)
print(cleaned)
